case_title: BINDING SERVICES CORPORATION et al VS GERREN, BILL et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GERREN, BILL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $252.00 FILED BY BINDING SERVICES CORPORATION SPIRAL BINDING AS TO DEFENDANT GERREN, BILL MARATHON SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BINDING SERVICES CORPORATION SPIRAL BINDING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERREN, BILL $252.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $292.00, DEFT MARATHON SYSTEMS DISMISSSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE NO PROOF OF SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GERREN, BILL MARATHON SYSTEMS
